projectDescription: A prop-trading platform for prediction markets that funds traders up to $200k to trade live Polymarket events after passing a rules-based challenge.
keyFeatures: One-step challenge evaluation — no multi-phase hoops
Trade live Polymarket prediction market prices (politics, crypto, sports, tech, AI)
Challenge accounts from $10k to $200k with a one-time fee
Free $1,000 demo account for every new user
USDC payouts to wallet or bank within 24 hours
No KYC required to start a challenge
Clear risk rules: profit target, daily drawdown, total drawdown, max risk per trade, inactivity limit
Automatic funded account activation upon passing — no delays or verification phase
publicApiSurface: GET /events/dashboard — grouped event feed by Polymarket category
GET /events/slug/:slug — event snapshot with latest prices
POST /trades — place a simulated YES/NO trade
GET /positions?eventId= — positions for a specific event
GET /positions/portfolio — all positions across events with PnL
POST /challenges/checkout/intents — create a challenge purchase intent
POST /payouts — request a payout with destination address
